openjumper_tts_init.message0: TTS Init RX Pin: %1 TX Pin: %2
openjumper_tts_init.tooltip: Initialize the OpenJumper TTS speech synthesis module and set the soft serial communication pins

openjumper_tts_play_invoice.tooltip: Play the ringtone, prompt tone or warning tone built into the TTS module

openjumper_tts_play_control.tooltip: Control TTS playback status: stop, pause or resume playback

openjumper_tts_play_text.tooltip: Convert text content into voice broadcast, supporting Chinese and numbers

openjumper_tts_setcfg.tooltip: Set TTS voice parameters: speaking speed (0-10), intonation (0-10) or volume (0-10)

openjumper_tts_restore_defaults.tooltip: Restore speaking speed, intonation, and volume to default values
